summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and no shared canonical should be invented, so each PR is kept as an independent maintainer-review item. No close, merge, fix, or security-route action is planned.

actions.reason: Independent open PR awaiting maintainer review; no safe close-style classification is supported by the hydrated artifact.
Independent open PR with author-follow-up and technical-review signals; not duplicate, superseded, or low-signal under the provided evidence.
Independent focused bug-fix PR awaiting maintainer review; no duplicate/superseded/low-signal closeout evidence is present.
Independent open PR with useful focused code but failing checks and unresolved bot-review detail; keep for maintainer/author follow-up rather than closing.
Independent open Telegram/status PR with proof and conflicts; keep for maintainer review or branch repair outside this plan-only close/comment/label shard.
